test:frontend.error: Jest configuration missing - tests use vitest imports but Jest is not configured to handle TypeScript/ESM imports properly. Error: 'Cannot use import statement outside a module' in auth.test.ts

test:backend.error: Database connection failure - sqlalchemy.exc.ArgumentError: Could not parse SQLAlchemy URL from string ''. DATABASE_URL environment variable is empty. Also pydantic validation error: APP_URL is not a permitted field in Settings class (extra='forbid' by default in Pydantic v2)

reviewsSummary.reason: Feature review skipped due to validator failures

blockingIssues.description: Backend tests fail: Database URL not configured. Tests require running PostgreSQL via Docker or test database setup.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Ensure DATABASE_URL environment variable is set and PostgreSQL is accessible. The services.yaml defines 'docker:up' command to start postgres.

blockingIssues.description: Backend tests fail: Pydantic Settings validation error - 'APP_URL' is not permitted. This suggests APP_URL is in the environment but not defined in Settings class.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Either remove APP_URL from environment or add it to the Settings class in internal/config.py

blockingIssues.description: Frontend tests fail: Jest is not configured to handle TypeScript/ESM imports. Tests in src/lib/auth.test.ts use 'vitest' imports but Jest is configured as the test runner.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Either configure Jest to handle ESM/TypeScript properly, or switch test files from vitest to Jest syntax, or add jest.config.js/ts with proper transformIgnorePatterns

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a 'test:setup' command that ensures Docker services are running and environment is configured before tests run
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: test:backend fails immediately because DATABASE_URL is not set and postgres is not running

completedContentFeatures.description: Build Previous Year Questions library with year/subject/topic filtering, practice mode, exam simulation mode, bookmarking, and search
Build performance analytics dashboard: score trends, subject/chapter accuracy, weak area map, time analytics, revision recommendations with PYQ/study links
Build AI-powered personalized study plan: generates daily/weekly tasks based on exam date and weak areas, revision cycles, backlog recovery, streak tracking
Build admin content management: create/edit subjects, topics, lessons, questions, test series. CMS for all content with rich text editor and file uploads
